# Task Log - 12-20-2025 14:11

## Objective
Make the contents of Cartridges/Examples available when the user runs the application

## Current Situation
- Example cartridge files (.ucart) exist in `Cartridge/Examples/` directory:
  - HauntedMansion.ucart
  - LostCave.ucart
  - Template.ucart
- CartridgeListWindow loads cartridges from the output directory's `Cartridge` folder
- Currently, the cartridge files are not being copied to the build output directory

## Changes Made

### Ubiquitous.csproj
- Added ItemGroup to copy all .ucart files from Cartridge/Examples/ to the output directory
- Set CopyToOutputDirectory to PreserveNewest to avoid unnecessary copies on every build
- Maintains the directory structure in the output (Cartridge/Examples/)
- Added ubiquitus-dark_128x128.png as a Resource (needed for MainWindow logo from previous task)

## Verification
- Build successful
- Cartridge files confirmed in output directory:
  - bin/Debug/net10.0-windows/Cartridge/Examples/HauntedMansion.ucart
  - bin/Debug/net10.0-windows/Cartridge/Examples/LostCave.ucart
  - bin/Debug/net10.0-windows/Cartridge/Examples/Template.ucart

## Expected Result
When the application is built and run, the example cartridges will be available in the Cartridge selection window.

## Status
Completed
